parameters.content:
## PS Assessment → Slack — setup (3 things)

**1. Google Sheets credential**
Click the "New Assessment Result" node → connect your Google account → then pick:
• Document: PS Assessment sheet
• Sheet: **Assessment Result** tab (verify the dropdown!)

**2. Slack bot token**
Open the "Build Slack Message" node → replace `xoxb-REPLACE-WITH-YOUR-BOT-TOKEN`
with your Bot User OAuth Token (chat:write scope, bot invited to the channel).
Channel is already set to C07532VA22X.

**3. Activate**
Toggle the workflow Active (top-right). It polls every minute; a new row in
Assessment Result posts a scored message + a threaded recording link.

_Test: add a dummy row to Assessment Result, or click "Test workflow"._

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ channel: $('Build Slack Message').item.json.slackChannel, thread_ts: $json.ts, text: $('Build Slack Message').item.json.threadText, unfurl_links: false }) }}
